name: homelab
description: Infrastructure skills for homelab cluster (Grafana, Terraform)

interface.shortDescription: Infrastructure skills for Grafana and Terraform workflows.
interface.longDescription: Codex wrapper for the homelab Claude plugin. Reuses the existing Grafana, Terraform, and skill QA workflows from this repository.
defaultPrompt: Inspect Grafana alerts in the homelab cluster.
Check recent Terraform Cloud runs and workspace state.
Review a SKILL.md file for quality issues.
